chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-2545 of 2020 Muhammad Umair & another Versus Federation of Pakistan & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For hearing of CMA 15478/20 2. For hearing of CMA 11444/20 3. For hearing of main case Dated: 05.08.2024 Mr. Jehanzeb Baloch, associate of Mr. Ovais Ali Shah for petitioners. Mr. Khaleeq Ahmed, Deputy Attorney General. Mr. S. Dilshad Hussain Shah, Special Prosecutor NAB. -.-.- Learned counsel for petitioners submits that the grievance of the petitioners has been redressed and as such on instructions he does not press this petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with listed applications. Chief Justice Judge
